name: poco
desc: Poco will help you to organise and manage Docker, Docker-Compose, Kubernetes, Openshift projects of any complexity using simple YAML config files to shorten th…
descFull: Poco will help you to organise and manage Docker, Docker-Compose, Kubernetes, Openshift projects of any complexity using simple YAML config files to shorten the route from finding your project to initialising it in your local environment.
